### Self-Evolving Multi-Agent AI Ecosystem

> Not a demo. Not a concept. Working agents that write code, monitor servers, make engineering decisions, and evolve — every minute, without stopping.

---

## How It Works

Management happens through **Myrmex Control** — a real-time dashboard (`myrmexcontrol.shtab-ai.ru`). Projects, tasks, artifacts, kanban, insights — all in one place. Myrmex is the single source of truth.

A **swarm of 7 agents** built on Qwen Code works asynchronously. Each one is a specialist with a name, a role, and a clear domain.

🦉 **Owl** — Principal Engineer, quality assurance. Sees the full architecture. Audits, reviews, standards.

🐦‍⬛ **Raven** — Reconnaissance, analytics, monitoring. Flies ahead and seeks the new.

🐱 **Cat** — Infrastructure, monitoring, VPN. Servers stay alive while Cat watches.

🦁 **Beast** — Security, DPI circumvention, data protection. Nobody gets through.

🐜 **Ant** — Development, Myrmex technical lead. Makes code that doesn't need rewriting.

🔨 **Streikbrecher** — Commercial agent, senior full-stack. SaaS, protocols, APIs.

👤 **ZavLab** — Human operator. Strategic decisions, task creation, oversight.

---

## 16 Projects

Data from Myrmex Control — the single source of truth.

**Production**

📊 **Myrmex Control** — lab management dashboard. Kanban, artifacts, agent monitoring, WebSocket chat, RBAC, design system, knowledge graph.

**Active**

📰 **Hype Pilot** — AI-powered auto-posting with cross-publication.

🌐 **Snablab** — procurement management: parsers, analytics, integrations.

🌐 **ZPRR Tracker** — AI speech development tracker for children.

🤖 **LLM Evangelist** — automated LLM news digest in Telegram (planned merge into Hype Pilot).

🤖 **Mail Daemon** — lab mail service.

🤖 **MSK Gastro Digest Bot** — gastro digest for Moscow.

🤖 **Protocol Bot** — personal memory and protocols on FTS5.

🤖 **Stenographer** — meeting minutes and transcription.

🤖 **Zakupki Drop Bot** — government procurement monitoring (to be merged into Snablab).

📁 **VPN Daemon** — Xray VPN management (VLESS/REALITY).

📁 **Passive Income Engine** — passive income automation.

🏗️ **Remote Access Toolkit** — remote equipment access.

🔌 **Fedlab Parser** — parser (to be merged into Snablab).

**Paused**

☁️ **OpenClawBox** — billing, API keys, LLM model aggregation.

**Archived**

🔧 **GitHub Premium** — integration (archived).

---

## 116 Tasks — All Completed

Cycle: session → insight → artifact → code → test → deploy → monitor → next cycle.

Key completed areas:

- Security: hardening, rate limiting, RBAC, file exchange, secret management
- Infrastructure: async I/O, caching, auto-backup, monitoring stack, blue-green deploy
- Quality: kanban E2E tests, design system, input validation, CSP
- Core: Smart Kanban with WIP limits, WebSocket chat, knowledge graph, session memory, self-improvement loop, demo mode, artifact CRUD

---

## Technology

```
Languages:  Python · TypeScript · Bash · SQL
Backend:    FastAPI · aiogram · Redis · PostgreSQL · SQLite FTS5
Frontend:   React · CSS Grid · Telegram Web Apps
DevOps:     Docker · systemd · GitHub Actions · pre-commit · TruffleHog
VPN:        Xray Core (VLESS/REALITY) · AmneziaWG · nginx SNI routing
Core:       Qwen Code · Myrmex Control · self-evolution pipeline
```
